function.message: No recorded message from Gregor Leitner was found in any channel transcript.
function.rulebook_notes: Bootstrapped with tree/read/context, inspected 99_system as required by root AGENTS.MD, read nested AGENTS.MD files before entering entities and channels, resolved identity from canonical cast record, and read every channel file fully as instructed by the task-local hint.
function.outcome_justification: The canonical cast record 10_entities/cast/gregor.md identifies the target as Gregor Leitner with alias gregor. Every transcript in 60_outbox/channels/*.md was then read fully: dockflow_ops_slack, grimdark_discord, health_signal, helios_client_email, household_calendar, household_signal, northstar_email, studio_signal, and work_calendar. None attributes any message to Gregor Leitner, Gregor, or alias gregor, so the requested exact last message text is absent from the available records.
